description: Productized kit / bundle intent matrix (KIT-MATRIX-001). Source-of-truth planning data mapping customer-facing kit SKUs onto module SKUs and the firmware combination strings tracked in config/firmware-combination-matrix.json. This file is planning / intent only: it does not add product YAMLs, WebFlash wrappers, firmware builds, artifacts, releases, or stable promotions, and it does not imply WebFlash exposure. See docs/kit-intent-matrix.md.

kits.notes: Default stable bathroom bundle. Mounts Core (S360-100) on a PoE PSU (S360-410), pairs the bathroom-purpose VentIQ air-quality module (S360-211) with RoomIQ (S360-200). The firmware config string Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ is the Release-One stable WebFlash build (see config/webflash-builds.json). LED ring (S360-300) is deliberately excluded from this kit and routed through the preview kit S360-KIT-BATH-POE-LED until LED stable gates close.

kits.customer_name: Sense360 Bathroom Kit — PoE + Status Ring Preview
kits.notes: Preview / early-access bundle that adds the LED status ring (S360-300) on top of the stable bathroom kit. The firmware config string Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ-LED is committed to config/webflash-builds.json on the preview channel only. Stable promotion requires the 17-row preview-to-stable gauntlet in docs/preview-to-stable-promotion-gates.md, including S360-300-BENCH-001 bench evidence (harness rail, LED count, harness identity) and the WebFlash operator-proof containers WF-HW-TEST-001 / WF-HW-TEST-003, plus RELEASE-007. None of those have closed yet, so this row stays preview only and stable_ready_now is false.

kits.customer_name: Sense360 Bathroom Kit — Relay Fan Control
kits.notes: Future expansion bundle pairing the stable bathroom kit with the FanRelay driver (S360-310). No default_config_string is committed because no FanRelay config string is currently in config/webflash-builds.json. Implementation chain runs CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001C → CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001A → PACKAGE-RELAY-001 → PRODUCT-RELAY-001 → WEBFLASH-RELAY-001 → RELEASE-RELAY-001 per docs/firmware-build-gap-report.md fanrelay lane.

kits.customer_name: Sense360 Bathroom Kit — TRIAC Fan Control
kits.notes: Advanced / manual bathroom bundle using the FanTRIAC driver (S360-320) for mains-voltage fan control. Still blocked from kit exposure. Of the four blocker tokens kept above for history: HW-005 and HW-PINMAP-320-FOLLOWUP are RESOLVED (TRIAC-PINMAP-CORRECT-001 — schematic-verified gate IO14 / zero-cross IO13); PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 remains open until the signed operator attestation is committed; and COMPLIANCE-001 is CLOSED by market posture per COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 (S360-320 is never placed on the market — not sold, not bundled, not buyable; docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md), so its element now denotes that record's experimental-lane preconditions. Per the resolution, an experimental self-build build is NEVER in the kit picker: this kit row stays non-exposable regardless of the commissioning PR, and at most a sellable kit may be designated expansion-ready for the self-build board under the resolution's two binding conditions.

kits.customer_name: Sense360 Duct Fan Kit — PWM Fan Control
kits.notes: Future kitchen / duct-fan bundle using the 12V PWM fan driver (S360-311). PWM is not a default bathroom option — this is an advanced duct-fan / kitchen-style concept. No default_config_string is committed because no FanPWM config string is currently in config/webflash-builds.json. Implementation chain runs CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001B → PACKAGE-PWM-001 → PRODUCT-PWM-001 → WEBFLASH-PWM-001 → RELEASE-PWM-001 per docs/firmware-build-gap-report.md fanpwm lane.

kits.customer_name: Sense360 Duct Fan Kit — 0–10V Fan Control
kits.notes: Future kitchen / duct-fan bundle using the 0–10V (GP8403 I²C DAC) fan driver (S360-312). 0–10V is not a default bathroom option — this is an advanced duct-fan / kitchen-style concept. The grammar in config/webflash-compatibility.json forbids FanDAC + AirIQ, so FanDAC-bearing combinations live entirely in the duct-fan space. No default_config_string is committed because no FanDAC config string is currently in config/webflash-builds.json. Implementation chain runs CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001B → PACKAGE-DAC-001 → PRODUCT-DAC-001 → WEBFLASH-DAC-001 → RELEASE-DAC-001 per docs/firmware-build-gap-report.md fandac lane.
